name: com.yohawing.mmd-loader
description: Unity package for importing, placing, and playing PMX/VMD assets through standard Unity workflows.

samples.description: PMX/VMD golden path sample (PMX drag -> Scene placement -> VMD to Timeline -> optional Humanoid Clip bake) with redistributable sample assets.
Standalone runtime verification player for direct PMX/VMD parse, playback, Timeline drive, and JSON diagnostics using local assets.
